description: Rank certificates for D7(m), m=3,5. rank[c][state] increments by 1 along the m-step color return map.

3.state_encoding: index = (((x0*m + x1)*m + x2)*m + x3)*m + x4)*m + x5; x6 = -sum(x0..x5) mod m

5.state_encoding: index = (((x0*m + x1)*m + x2)*m + x3)*m + x4)*m + x5; x6 = -sum(x0..x5) mod m
